app.name: PromptHub
app.description: Local Prompt Manager with Version Control

prompt.title: Title
prompt.translateDetectedEnglish: English detected, translate to current language
prompt.bilingualHint: Support bilingual prompts for easy reference and modification
prompt.typeImageDesc: Test with image models (e.g., DALL-E). Generated images will be saved to preview.
prompt.mismatchText: Current Prompt is Text type, please configure a Chat Model in settings.
prompt.mismatchImage: Current Prompt is Image type, please configure an Image Model in settings.
prompt.sourcePlaceholder: Where did you find this Prompt? e.g. URL, book, etc.
prompt.addFirst: Click "New" to create your first Prompt
prompt.selectPromptDesc: Select a Prompt from the list to view details, or click "New" to create one
prompt.noHistoryHint: Version history will be saved automatically after editing
prompt.tableViewHint: Changed cells compare each version with the next older version.
prompt.restoreConfirm: Are you sure you want to restore to v{{version}}? Current content will be overwritten.
prompt.deleteVersionConfirm: Delete v{{version}}? This history entry will be removed permanently.
prompt.jsonSchemaHint: Define the JSON structure for output, AI will strictly follow this format
prompt.selectModelsHint: Select multiple models to compare responses
prompt.selectAtLeast2: Please select at least 2 models to compare
prompt.confirmDeletePrompt: Are you sure you want to delete this Prompt?
prompt.unsavedChangesMessage: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save them?
prompt.imageDownloadFailedMessage: Unable to download image from this URL. Please check if the link is correct.
prompt.emptyDetailTagsHint: No tags yet. Edit this Prompt or drag tags from the sidebar.
prompt.enterTagHint: Enter new tag and press Enter
prompt.mediaUploadHint: Supported formats: Images JPG/PNG/GIF/WEBP · Videos MP4/WebM/MOV/AVI/MKV · URL download timeout 30s
prompt.downloadTimeout: Image download timed out, please check network or URL
prompt.aiTestAttachmentHint: PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF for multimodal chat models. Up to {{count}}, {{size}} each.
prompt.aiTestImageLimit: Up to {{count}} images can be attached
prompt.systemPromptPlaceholder: Set the AI's role and behavior...
prompt.userPromptPlaceholder: Enter your Prompt content, use {{variableName}} or {{variableName:example}} to define variables...
prompt.variableTipContent: Use {{variableName}} or {{variableName:exampleValue}} to define variables, e.g., {{language}} or {{courseName:Computer Science}}
prompt.aiRewriteHint: Describe how you want to improve the current prompt. AI will generate a new draft, but it will not save automatically.
prompt.aiRewriteDone: AI draft ready. Review it before saving.
prompt.aiRewriteUndoDone: Restored the draft from before the AI rewrite
prompt.aiRewriteNeedsInstruction: Describe how you want AI to rewrite this prompt first
prompt.aiRewriteNeedsContent: Write some prompt content first before asking AI to rewrite it
prompt.aiRewriteNeedsModel: Configure an available chat model in settings first
prompt.aiRewriteReady: AI will generate rewrite suggestions from your current draft
prompt.aiRewriteSummaryDefault: AI has updated the draft. Review and save when ready.
prompt.aiRewritePlaceholder: Example: keep the original intent, but make the output more suitable for Claude and add clearer steps plus a final output format.
prompt.aiRewriteTemplateImage: Improve visual detail and style constraints
prompt.quickRewriteHint: Describe the change you want. AI will prepare a draft before anything is saved.
prompt.quickRewriteReady: Generate a draft from the current prompt without opening the full editor
prompt.quickRewritePreviewHint: The current prompt is shown below. Generate a draft to preview AI changes.
prompt.fillVariables: Please fill in the variable values (auto-saved)
prompt.branchListFallbackHint: Could not load remote branches. You can still type one manually.
prompt.confirmBatchDelete: Are you sure you want to delete these {{count}} prompts?

rules.title: Rules
rules.sidebarHint: Manage global rule files and project AGENTS.md files from one workspace.
rules.addProjectRuleDirectoryHint: Pick a code project folder and PromptHub will create and maintain an AGENTS.md rule file inside it for AI tools to read.
rules.aiRewriteTitle: Ask AI to improve this rule
rules.aiRewriteHint: Describe the change you want. AI will prepare a new draft for the selected rule file.
rules.aiRewritePlaceholder: Example: add testing requirements, reorganize sections, or strengthen the wording while keeping the current markdown headings where possible.
rules.draftEditMode: Draft editor - not written to the file until you save
rules.saveOverwriteHint: Saving writes this draft to the real rules file.
rules.versionHint: Snapshots are read-only history. Select one to preview it, then restore it into the draft if needed.
rules.versionEmpty: No snapshots yet. Saving or AI rewriting will create local history.
rules.searchPlaceholder: Search rule files, platforms, or paths...
rules.conflictMessage: The external file no longer matches PromptHub's managed copy. Choose which version to keep as the source of truth. The other version will be overwritten after confirmation.
rules.conflictConfirmUseManagedMessage: PromptHub's managed copy will become the source of truth and overwrite the external rule file.
rules.conflictConfirmUseTargetMessage: The external rule file will become the source of truth and overwrite PromptHub's managed copy.
rules.conflictResolvedUseManaged: Kept the PromptHub version and synced it to the external file
rules.conflictResolvedUseTarget: Kept the external file version and synced it to PromptHub
rules.aiRewriteSummary: AI has generated a new draft. Review it and save when ready.
rules.versionDeleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this snapshot? This action cannot be undone.

folder.name: Name
folder.privateNeedPassword: Please set a master password in Settings > Security first
folder.privateNeedPasswordInline: Please set a master password in "Settings - Security" first.
folder.privateHint: After saving, this folder will be encrypted and will require password verification.
folder.unlockDesc: You need to unlock the master password before saving a private folder
folder.deleteFolderOnlyDesc: Keep {{count}} prompts and move them to root
folder.deleteAllContentDesc: Delete the folder and all {{count}} prompts inside
folder.deletedMovedPrompts: Deleted folder, moved {{count}} prompts to root
folder.duplicateDesc: A folder named "{{name}}" already exists. Do you still want to create it?
folder.deletePrivateDesc: This will delete the private folder "{{name}}" and all encrypted contents. Enter master password to confirm.
folder.privateUnlockMessage: Folder "{{name}}" is private. Enter the master password to unlock and view its content.

settings.confirmLogoutToGuest: Are you sure you want to log out of the current account and switch back to the local guest account? This will safely disconnect current account data and reload the local offline guest environment.
settings.detectedLocalAccounts: Cached Cloud Accounts on this Machine
settings.confirmLoadAccountData: Are you sure you want to switch to and load local data for account "{{accountId}}"?
settings.securityDesc: Master password unlocks private content. PromptHub stores only a salted password hash, never the plain text password. Private content stays hidden until unlocked.
settings.pwdTooShort: Master password must be at least 4 characters
settings.newPwdTooShort: New password must be at least 4 characters
settings.title: Settings
settings.launchAtStartupDesc: Automatically run PromptHub when system starts
settings.closeActionDesc: Action when clicking the close button
settings.homeModulesHint: At least one module stays enabled so the desktop home always has a reachable workspace.
settings.homeModulesReorderHint: Drag enabled modules to reorder the desktop home rail.
settings.desktopModulePromptsDesc: Prompt editing, folders, tags and search
settings.desktopModuleSkillsDesc: My Skills, projects and store workflows
settings.backgroundImageDesc: Pick a local image and turn it into your desktop background, give PromptHub a workspace feel that fits you, keep the actual file in PromptHub's image library, and save only a lightweight reference in settings for easier backup and migration.
settings.backgroundImageEnabledHint: Background image is currently enabled for the desktop shell.
settings.backgroundImageDisabledHint: Background image is saved but currently disabled.
settings.customColorDesc: Pick any color and apply it globally

motion.title: Motion
motion.desc: Control how much animation the desktop renderer plays. 'Standard' overrides the system 'reduce motion' setting on this machine.

settings.syncProviderDesc: You can enable multiple backup targets, but automatic sync uses only one source at a time to avoid conflicts.
settings.syncSourceInactiveDesc: This target stays available for manual backup and restore, but automatic sync only runs for the current sync source.
settings.dataPathDesc: Location where Prompt data is stored
settings.cacheDataDesc: Electron renderer process cache, does not affect data
settings.confirmDataMigration:
Are you sure you want to migrate data to the new directory?

The app needs to restart after migration.
settings.existingDataPathTitle: Target directory already contains PromptHub data
settings.existingDataPathDesc: If this directory was copied from another computer, choose “Switch to this directory”. “Overwrite and migrate” will replace the data in that directory with data from this computer.
settings.confirmOverwriteDataPath: Overwrite the data in this directory with this computer's data? PromptHub will create a backup of the target directory first.
settings.dataPathOverwriteSuccess: Data migrated and target backup created
settings.restartNow: Data migration complete. Restart the app now?
settings.pendingDataPath: Will switch to this directory after restart:
settings.exportDesc: Export all data as JSON file
settings.selectiveExportDesc: Export selected data. Restorable later via the restore action.
settings.fullBackupDesc: For migration: includes prompts, images, AI config, settings, and skills
settings.upgradeBackupsDesc: Local rollback points created automatically before upgrades. Restoring a snapshot first saves your current state as a new snapshot, then rolls back and restarts automatically.
settings.upgradeBackupsEmpty: No automatic upgrade backups found yet.
settings.upgradeBackupsSummaryExpanded: Showing full history in a scrollable list
settings.upgradeBackupsSummaryCompact: All snapshots fit in the compact list
settings.upgradeBackupRestoreConfirm: Restore the automatic snapshot from {{from}}{{to}} created at {{createdAt}}? PromptHub will first save your current state as another backup, then restart.
settings.upgradeBackupRestoreScheduled: Upgrade backup restored. PromptHub will restart automatically.
settings.upgradeBackupDeleteConfirm: Delete the automatic snapshot {{backupId}}? This history entry cannot be recovered.
settings.importPreviewBackupNotice: PromptHub will automatically create a local safety backup of your current state before importing.
settings.importPreviewSkipped: Invalid records that will be skipped
settings.importConfirmAction: Back up current data and import
settings.recoveryScannerDesc: Find recoverable data from old version directories, manually specified folders, or historical backups. Preview and select your restore source.
settings.recoveryExtraPathsDesc: Add old install folders or copied data directories to include them in recovery scans.
settings.recoveryExtraPathsEmpty: No extra scan directories added yet.
settings.recoveryScanEmpty: No recoverable history was found in the scanned locations.
settings.manualRecoveryPathExists: This scan directory has already been added.
settings.clearNeedPassword: Clearing data is a high-risk operation. Please set a master password in Security settings first
settings.webdavEnabledDesc: Sync data to WebDAV server when enabled
settings.webdavAutoSyncDesc: Bidirectional sync on startup (including images): upload if local is newer, download if remote is newer
settings.webdavAutoRunDesc: Periodically attempt to sync data automatically. May affect battery usage.
settings.selfHostedAutoRunDesc: Keep desktop and your self-hosted PromptHub workspace aligned on a background schedule.
settings.webdavSyncOnStartupDesc: Automatically sync once after app startup. Changes take effect on next launch.
settings.selfHostedSyncOnStartupDesc: Automatically pull from your self-hosted PromptHub workspace after desktop startup. Changes take effect on next launch.
settings.webdavSyncOnSaveDesc: Attempt sync when data is saved. Note: frequent syncing may affect performance and battery.
settings.webdavSyncOnSaveUnavailableDesc: Reserved for future support. Saving data does not trigger sync in the current build.
settings.webdavIncludeImagesDesc: Include all image files when syncing. Disable to reduce backup size and sync time.
settings.webdavIncrementalSyncDesc: Only upload changed files, significantly reducing bandwidth usage. First sync will upload all data.
settings.webdavEncryptionDesc: Encrypt backup data with AES-256. Warning: Forgetting the password will make data unrecoverable!
settings.webdavEncryptionPasswordPlaceholder: Enter encryption password (optional, leave empty to skip)
settings.s3StorageDesc: Configure an S3-compatible object storage backup target such as AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, OSS, or COS.
settings.s3StorageUnavailableDesc: S3 sync is not available in the current build yet. Connection, upload, download, and automatic sync stay disabled.
settings.aiConfigDesc1: Test Prompts with AI after configuration
settings.aiConfigDesc2: API Key is stored locally and never uploaded
settings.aiConfigDesc4: Model names can be entered manually
settings.translationModeDesc: Choose how AI translates skill content
settings.translationImmersiveDesc: Original and translated text shown alternately, paragraph by paragraph
settings.translationFullDesc: Replace original text with fully translated content
settings.languageChangeHint: Refresh the page after changing the language.
settings.enableNotificationsDesc: Allow app to send desktop notifications
settings.tagFilterModeDesc: Choose whether clicking a tag replaces the current filter or adds to a multi-select filter
settings.macManualInstall:
Download complete! Due to macOS signing restrictions, please install manually:

1. Open the Downloads folder
2. Double-click the DMG installer to install
3. If you see a security warning, allow it in System Settings > Privacy & Security

If you installed via Homebrew, you can simply run:
brew upgrade --cask prompthub
settings.homebrewUpdateHint: This PromptHub build was installed via Homebrew. Please upgrade it with Homebrew instead of the in-app DMG updater.
settings.homebrewUpdateRequired: This PromptHub build appears to be installed via Homebrew. Please run 'brew upgrade --cask prompthub' instead of using the in-app updater.
settings.manualDownloadHint: Auto-update failed? You can manually download the latest version:
settings.installRestartHint: Installing will close the app and start the installer.
settings.backupDropRestoreDesc: Drag a PromptHub backup archive here to review and restore it quickly.
settings.backupDropUnsupported: Please drop a PromptHub backup file (.json, .phub.gz, .gz, or .zip).
settings.backupRequiredForUpgrade: Manual backup is required before in-app upgrade
settings.backupRequiredForUpgradeDesc: Create a manual backup for the current version to unlock installation. PromptHub will still create an automatic local snapshot immediately before the installer starts.
settings.backupOptionalForUpgradeDesc: If you want an extra full export, you can create it here first. You can still continue installing without it. PromptHub will automatically create a local snapshot right before installation starts.
settings.backupMissingForUpgrade: A manual backup for version {{version}} is required before installation. PromptHub will also create an automatic local snapshot once installation starts.
settings.backupReadyForUpgrade: Manual backup recorded at {{time}}. Installation is now unlocked, and PromptHub will still create an automatic local snapshot before installation.
settings.backupConfirmUpgrade: I have backed up the relevant data and understand the app will close during installation.
settings.backupConfirmRequired: Confirm the backup acknowledgement before continuing with the upgrade.
settings.autoCheckUpdateDesc: Automatically check for new versions on startup
settings.mirrorSourceDesc: Accelerator mirrors are provided by third parties. Contents are generally consistent with official.
settings.mirrorSourceRisk: If enabled, the app will automatically try mirrors when official source fails. Mirrors are generally safe but not officially maintained. Recommended only if official download is slow.
settings.projectInfoDesc1: An all-in-one AI toolbox for prompt, skill, and agent asset management
settings.projectInfoDesc2: Reuse prompts, distribute skills with one click, and manage agent assets in one place
settings.projectInfoDesc3: Supports cloud sync, backup, version control, and local-first privacy
settings.cliShortDesc: Install the command-line tool to manage prompts and skills from the terminal.
settings.cliFeatureDesc:
Once installed, use the prompthub command in your terminal:
• Create, edit, and search prompts
• Install, update, and uninstall skills
• Manage rules and project rules
• Export/import your full workspace
settings.cliStandaloneDesc: PromptHub CLI is distributed as a standalone package and can be installed globally without building from source.
settings.cliInstallHint: The installer uses the current GitHub release tarball and runs a standard global npm or pnpm install command.
settings.cliCheckingStatus: Checking whether the `prompthub` command is available...
settings.cliInstalledDesc: The `prompthub` command is available. Current version: {{version}}
settings.cliNotInstalledDesc: The `prompthub` command is not available yet on this machine.
settings.cliCommandDesc: The shell command you can run after installation
settings.cliInstallSourceDesc: The GitHub release tarball used for one-click installation
settings.cliInstallSourcePending: Current release tarball is not available yet
settings.cliPackageManagerDesc: PromptHub will prefer pnpm when available, otherwise npm
settings.cliPackageManagerMissing: Neither pnpm nor npm was detected on PATH
settings.cliStatusLoadFailed: Failed to load PromptHub CLI status
settings.projectRepositoryDesc: Browse PromptHub source code and releases on GitHub
settings.communityDiscordDesc: Join the PromptHub Discord community for announcements and discussion
settings.communityQQDesc: Try opening the QQ group directly. If QQ cannot jump, search for the group number {{group}} manually in the client
settings.reportIssueDesc: Submit issues or suggestions on GitHub
settings.author: Author
settings.configImageModel: Please configure an image model first
settings.imageGenEmptyResult: The image generation endpoint returned no image
settings.noImageModelHint: Please configure an image model in settings first
settings.aiWorkbenchProviderTypeHint: Uses {{type}} protocol preset and endpoint rules.
settings.fillApiFirst: Please fill in API Key and URL first
settings.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this model?
settings.apiUrlHint: End with # to fully disable auto-fill
settings.aiWorkbenchApiUrlGuide: Enter the provider base URL or version root only. PromptHub will append the final request path automatically. If you want to preserve the exact address you entered, add # at the end and PromptHub will stop appending any path in both the saved URL and request preview.
settings.aiWorkbenchApiUrlDetectedFullEndpoint: A full endpoint path was detected. PromptHub will normalize it to the base URL on blur/save.
settings.fillComplete: Please fill in all required fields
settings.noModelsHint: Add models to use multi-model comparison on Prompt detail page
settings.aiWorkbenchDescription: Manage global AI models and define scenario-based default routing.
settings.aiWorkbenchNoModels: No models configured yet. Add a chat or image model first.
settings.aiWorkbenchVisionCapabilityDesc: Can read images and screenshots for image reverse and multimodal prompts.
settings.aiWorkbenchReasoningCapabilityDesc: Supports thinking or reasoning output for complex analysis.
settings.aiWorkbenchToolUseCapabilityDesc: Supports function calling or tool execution interfaces.
settings.aiWorkbenchWebSearchCapabilityDesc: Can use provider-native search or search-grounded answers.
settings.aiWorkbenchEmbeddingCapabilityDesc: Produces vector embeddings for retrieval and knowledge indexing.
settings.aiWorkbenchRerankCapabilityDesc: Scores or reorders retrieved documents for search quality.
settings.aiWorkbenchFollowGlobalDefault: Follow the global default for this type
settings.aiWorkbenchScenarioQuickAddDesc: Analyze free-form input and generate a first Prompt draft.
settings.aiWorkbenchScenarioImageReverseDesc: Use a vision-capable chat model to reverse images into structured image prompts.
settings.aiWorkbenchScenarioPromptTestDesc: Used by the Prompt detail page and text-based AI tests.
settings.aiWorkbenchScenarioImageTestDesc: Default model for image Prompt testing.
settings.aiWorkbenchScenarioTranslationDesc: Used by Prompt and Skill translation flows.
settings.aiWorkbenchRouteMainTextDesc: Strong default chat model for primary text work and Prompt text testing.
settings.aiWorkbenchRouteFastTextDesc: Low-cost chat route for Quick Add analysis, translation, review, and lightweight utility tasks.
settings.aiWorkbenchRouteVisionTextDesc: Vision-capable chat model for image reverse and multimodal inputs.
settings.aiWorkbenchRouteImageGenerationDesc: Default image model for testing image Prompts.
settings.aiWorkbenchLegacyBannerDesc: Your existing AI features still work, but the new workbench needs that config imported into the multi-model list.
settings.aiWorkbenchFetchModelsUnsupported: This provider did not return a compatible model list endpoint. You can still enter the model ID manually.
settings.aiWorkbenchFetchModelsNetworkError: Could not reach the model list endpoint. Check API URL, network, proxy, or CORS policy.
settings.aiWorkbenchFetchModelsAuthError: The model list request was rejected. Check your API key and provider permissions.
settings.aiWorkbenchFetchModelsEmpty: The provider returned no models. If it hides the list endpoint, enter the model ID manually.
settings.aiWorkbenchConnectionNetworkError: Request failed before the provider responded. Check API URL, network, proxy, or CORS policy.
settings.aiWorkbenchConnectionAuthError: The provider rejected this request. Check your API key, account permission, and endpoint path.
settings.aiWorkbenchCorsBlocked: Browser blocked this cross-origin request (CORS) while calling {{target}}. Enable CORS on the provider or use an app-side proxy.
settings.aiWorkbenchCorsBlockedDev: Browser blocked this cross-origin request (CORS). Current page {{origin}} cannot directly call {{target}}. Either enable CORS on the provider or route this request through the Electron main process.
settings.aiWorkbenchInvalidCustomParams: Custom parameters must be a JSON object with string, number, or boolean values
settings.aiWorkbenchIncompleteModel: This model configuration is incomplete and cannot be tested
settings.aiWorkbenchEndpointNotTestable: No complete model under this endpoint can be tested yet
settings.aiWorkbenchNoDefaultModel: There is no default model available to test yet
settings.aiWorkbenchAdvancedParamsDesc: Request parameters remain configurable per model.
settings.aiWorkbenchModelModalSubtitle: Saved changes take effect immediately and participate in scenario routing.
settings.aiWorkbenchChatParamsDesc: Configure chat generation parameters for this model.
settings.aiWorkbenchImageParamsDesc: Configure image generation parameters for this model.
settings.aiWorkbenchAddProviderSubtitle: Configure the provider endpoint first. Models can be added under this provider later.
settings.aiWorkbenchEditEndpointSubtitle: This updates provider, API Key, and API URL for all models under the endpoint.
settings.aiWorkbenchModelProviderLocked: Provider endpoint is managed in Provider settings. This dialog only adds or edits the model under that provider.
settings.temperatureDesc: Controls randomness, higher values = more random (0-2)
settings.maxTokensDesc: Maximum number of tokens to generate
settings.topKDesc: Limits the number of candidates for each step
settings.streamOutputDesc: Show AI response in real-time instead of waiting for completion
settings.enableThinkingDesc: View model's reasoning process (requires model support)
settings.imageNDesc: Number of images to generate at once
settings.shortcutShowAppDesc: Quickly bring up the app window from anywhere
settings.shortcutModeDesc: Global shortcuts work from any app. Local shortcuts only work when PromptHub is focused
settings.enableGlobalShortcutsDesc: Allow shortcuts to work in other applications
settings.shortcutTip1: Click the input field and press your desired key combination
settings.shortcutTip2: Shortcuts must include a modifier key (Ctrl/Cmd/Alt/Shift) and a regular key
settings.shortcutTip3: Some shortcuts may conflict with system or other applications
settings.customParamsDesc: Add custom request parameters, e.g., max_completion_tokens
settings.clipboardImportDesc: Detect Prompt JSON in clipboard and prompt for import when window is focused
settings.platformSkillPathsDesc: Override the root directory for each AI tool platform. PromptHub will derive internal paths like skills and global rules from this root.
settings.platformSkillPathPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the default root, e.g. ~/.trae-cn
settings.platformRootPathsDesc: Override the root directory for each AI tool platform. PromptHub will derive internal paths like skills and global rules from this root.
settings.platformRootPathPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the default root, e.g. ~/.trae-cn
settings.platformDerivedPathHint: Skills, Rules, and related config files are derived from the platform root directory.
settings.extraSkillScanPathsDesc: Legacy setting. PromptHub now recommends managing agent roots instead of isolated Skill scan folders.
settings.customAgentsDesc: Add your own agent/tool entries with a name and root directory. PromptHub will derive scan paths and known local assets from each custom agent.
settings.customAgentRootPathsDesc: Register additional agent/tool root directories. PromptHub will derive scan paths and known local assets from each root instead of treating them as isolated Skill folders.
settings.agentRootPathHint: PromptHub treats this as an agent root and derives known local assets from it instead of scanning only one Skill folder.
settings.confirmDeleteCustomAgentMessage: Are you sure you want to delete custom agent "{{name}}"? This only removes it from PromptHub settings.
settings.noCustomAgentRoots: No custom agent roots added yet
settings.customSkillScanPathsDesc: Add directories containing your Skill files to include them in scans.
settings.skillBackupHint: To backup & restore Skills, go to the "Data" panel → Full backup / restore
settings.builtinSkillScanPathsDesc: The following AI tool Skill directories are automatically scanned by PromptHub.
settings.githubTokenDesc: Optional. Attach a GitHub personal access token (classic or fine-grained) so Skill Store requests use your authenticated rate limit (5 000 req/h) instead of the anonymous 60 req/h limit. The token is only sent to api.github.com and raw.githubusercontent.com.
settings.githubTokenScopeHint: A read-only token without any scope (public repositories) is enough for the skill store.
settings.skillInstallMethodDesc: Choose how to install Skills from PromptHub to AI tool platforms.
settings.skillInstallSymlinkDesc: Create a symlink in the platform directory pointing to PromptHub's Skills folder. More efficient for sync updates.
settings.skillInstallCopyDesc: Copy SKILL.md directly to the platform directory. Independent from PromptHub's directory.
settings.platformDisplayOrderDesc: Control which agent platforms are enabled and how they are ordered across Skills and Rules.
settings.agentConfigurationsDesc: Manage built-in and custom agent roots plus derived asset paths in one place. Skills, Rules, Agents, Commands, and config files all derive from these settings.
settings.agentConfigurationsHint: PromptHub treats each built-in platform as an agent config. Override any relative path only when the tool uses a non-standard layout.
settings.selfHostedWebDesc: This browser workspace is mainly for browsing Prompts and acting as a self-hosted backup / restore source. Desktop-local Skill, Rules, Agent, symlink, and platform distribution changes still need the desktop app.
settings.webSkillSettingsDesc: The self-hosted web workspace keeps Skill content in the same backup dataset, but does not manage local platform directories, symlinks, or desktop-only distribution flows.
settings.browserSessionDesc: Authentication and access are managed by this browser session instead of desktop runtime services.
settings.connectedClientDesc: The current browser and operating system connected to this self-hosted PromptHub workspace.
settings.connectedDevicesDesc: Desktop and browser clients that have recently connected to this self-hosted PromptHub workspace.
settings.deviceManagementDesc: Manage connected clients, desktop backup cadence, and Skill Store refresh behavior for this self-hosted workspace.
settings.deviceSyncCadenceDesc: How often desktop and browser clients should sync with this self-hosted PromptHub workspace.
settings.noConnectedDevices: No connected devices have reported in yet.
settings.storeAutoSyncDesc: Keep official and connected Skill sources refreshed automatically for this workspace.
settings.storeSyncCadenceDesc: How often the self-hosted web app should refresh connected Skill sources.
settings.storeSyncHint: Skill sources should stay fresh in the background so connected desktop clients and this web workspace see the same installable Skills.
settings.webUpdatesManagedDesc: Self-hosted web updates are managed by your deployment workflow. Pull the new version and redeploy the service instead of using in-app desktop updates.
settings.skillSafetyChecksDesc: Control automatic safety scans for installed Skills and pre-install checks from the store.
settings.autoScanInstalledSkillsDesc: Automatically run a safety scan when opening a Skill detail page to detect high-risk changes.
settings.autoScanStoreSkillsBeforeInstallDesc: Off by default. When enabled, a safety scan runs before adding a Skill from the store, blocking obviously dangerous entries.
settings.batchScanInstalledSkillsDesc: Manually run a safety scan on all Skills in your library to quickly find high-risk content.
settings.batchScanInstalledSkillsResult: Checked {{total}} skills · blocked {{blocked}} · high risk {{highRisk}} · warn {{warn}}
settings.selfHostedSyncDesc: Use your deployed PromptHub Web as an authenticated backup target and restore source for desktop data without WebDAV.
settings.webLoginPasswordDesc: Change the password used to sign in to this self-hosted web workspace.
settings.webPasswordTooShort: New login password must be at least 8 characters
settings.joinPreviewChannelDesc: When enabled, update checks only use prerelease preview builds from GitHub Releases. Stable releases are checked again after you turn this off.
settings.previewChannelWarning: Preview builds may be unstable. Please back up your data before updating and use them mainly for testing new fixes.
settings.previewChannelConfirmSubtitle: Preview updates are opt-in. When enabled, PromptHub checks prerelease builds only and will not automatically switch to stable releases.
settings.previewChannelConfirmRisk: Preview builds can include regressions, unfinished behavior, or migration edge cases that are not yet fully validated.
settings.previewChannelConfirmBackup: Before enabling this channel, create a manual backup or export so you can safely roll back if a preview build behaves unexpectedly.
settings.previewChannelConfirmConsent: Turn off the preview channel to return to stable updates. If your preview version is newer than the latest stable release, PromptHub will not downgrade automatically.

import.detectedDesc: The content in your clipboard matches the Prompt format. Would you like to import it?

auth.setupDescription: This deployment has not been initialized yet. Create the first administrator account to unlock the web workspace.
auth.setupHint: The first account becomes the local admin for this self-hosted instance. After setup, manage this workspace through its backup, restore, and settings flows.
auth.setupPasswordMismatch: The two passwords do not match.
auth.setupRegistrationLocked: Registration is currently unavailable. Check the server configuration before continuing.

resources.title: Recommended Resources
resources.claudeCodeOverviewDesc: Single official entry for docs, workflows, hooks, and settings
resources.openaiAgentsGuideDesc: OpenAI's practical guide for production-grade agents
resources.anthropicToolUseDesc: Tool-use patterns, guardrails, and implementation advice
resources.mcpQuickstartDesc: Protocol quickstart for tools, skills, and integrations

skill.title: Skill
skill.name: Skill Name
skill.author: Author
skill.defaultDescriptionLong: This is an AI agent skill containing instructions and configurations for specific tasks.
skill.overwriteConfirmMessage: A skill with the same name "{{name}}" already exists locally. Overwriting will replace all instructions and files. Do you want to continue?
skill.emptyDesc: Create your first AI agent skill
skill.scanLocalDesc: Scan local skills on your machine
skill.alreadyInstalled: This skill is already installed on all detected platforms
skill.noSkillsHint: Import skills from Skill Store, scan local environments, or create one manually to get started
skill.noFavoritesHint: Click the star on skill cards to add favorites
skill.noImportedSkillsHint: After importing from Skill Store, local scan, GitHub, or manual creation, they will appear here.
skill.noDeployedSkillsHint: After distributing skills to Claude, Cursor, or other platforms, they will show up here.
skill.noPendingSkillsHint: Skills not yet distributed to any platform will appear here.
skill.noDistributionSkillsHint: Import skills first, then install, sync, or uninstall them to Claude, Cursor, and other platforms here.

skill.webLibrarySubtitle: Manage your personal skill library in the self-hosted web workspace.
skill.workspaceHint: Manage all imported skills in one place, regardless of where they came from.
skill.distributionHint: Manage install, sync, and uninstall across connected platforms.
skill.projectRootPathFirstHint: Choose the project root first. PromptHub can infer the project name and start scanning right away.
skill.projectScanPathsHint: PromptHub always scans the project root plus default folders like .claude/skills, .agents/skills, skills, and .gemini. Add extra paths only if your project keeps skills elsewhere.
skill.projectScanPathsEmpty: No extra scan paths configured yet. PromptHub will still scan the project root automatically.
skill.projectFormRequired: Project name and root path are required.
skill.projectRootPathExists: This project root path is already registered.
skill.agentsSidebarHint: Browse each agent's Skill directory and manage copy or symlink installs.

skill.uninstallFromAgentConfirm: Remove this Skill folder from the selected agent? Symlink installs only remove the link.
skill.platformBuiltinCannotUninstall: Built-in skills cannot be removed from this agent.
skill.projectImportHint: Import this project-local skill into My Skills first. Use copy import for isolated snapshots, or symlink import when you want one source of truth and easier maintenance.
skill.projectImportedHint: This skill is already managed in My Skills. If the project copy changes, you can re-import to refresh it.
skill.globalProjectDeployHint: Select projects and distribute to their local agent folders.
skill.importFromMySkillsHint: Select one or more skills from My Skills and deploy them into this project's local agent folders.

skill.projectImportLibraryRescanFailed: Import completed, but PromptHub could not refresh the project list. Please rescan manually.
skill.projectDeployHint: Deploy this skill directly into project-local agent folders. PromptHub defaults to .agents/skills and lets you add more target folders when needed.
skill.advancedImportSettingsHint: Choose one or more target folders. If you skip this, PromptHub defaults to .agents/skills.
skill.projectImportCopyModeHint: Copy a standalone snapshot into the selected project folders.
skill.projectImportSymlinkModeHint: Link the project folder to My Skills so source updates stay in sync.
skill.selectSkillsToImportHint: Choose one or more skills to import into the selected project folders.
skill.projectsSidebarHint: Register project directories and manage their local skills.
skill.noProjectsHint: Add a project root to scan and manage project-local skills.
skill.projectWorkspaceHint: Scan project-local skill folders, import selected ones into PromptHub, or open the source paths directly.
skill.projectNoScanResultsHint: Run a scan to discover SKILL.md files inside this project, then choose whether to import them into PromptHub or just manage the source paths directly.
skill.projectSearchEmptyHint: Try another search keyword to find project-local skills.
skill.selectProjectHint: Choose a registered project on the left or add a new one to start scanning project-local skills.
skill.selectProjectSkillHint: Choose a project-local skill to view its content, translation, and files using the same detail view as My Skills.
skill.projectDeployNoTargets: Selected projects do not have any deploy target folders yet.

skill.storeHint: Discover and import skills from official, community, and custom stores.
skill.officialStoreComingSoonHint: The official store is not open yet. You can import skills from Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, or a custom store for now.
skill.communityStoreHint: Built-in skills.sh source for browsing public community skills from skills.sh.
skill.claudeCodeStoreHint: Built-in Claude Code source with first-class support for the official skills repo and common marketplace.json indexes.
skill.claudeCodeStoreDetail: This built-in source is meant for the Claude Code ecosystem. It is designed to work first with the official skills repository and marketplace.json indexes, and can later become a browsable remote store.
skill.openaiCodexStoreHint: Built-in OpenAI Codex source with first-class support for the curated openai/skills catalog.
skill.openaiCodexStoreDetail: This built-in source is meant for the OpenAI Codex ecosystem. It focuses on the curated openai/skills catalog and keeps the install flow compatible with directory-style SKILL.md repositories.
skill.clawHubStoreHint: Built-in ClawHub source for browsing public community skills from clawhub.ai.
skill.customStoresHint: Add your own store endpoints here. A later step can connect remote manifests or registries.
skill.customStoreEmpty: No skills in this custom store yet
skill.customStoreEmptyHint: This source is connected, but no skills were loaded yet. Try refreshing from the top right, or open Edit to adjust the source configuration.
skill.branchListFallbackHint: Could not load remote branches. You can still type one manually.
skill.sourceUpdateLocalModified: Local changes detected. Create a snapshot or review changes before updating.
skill.sourceUpdateConflict: Source and local content both changed. Review versions before overwriting.
skill.sourceTypeMarketplaceHint: Best for a direct marketplace.json URL. PromptHub will read the index and load store entries from it.
skill.sourceTypeGitHint: Best for a GitHub or Git repository URL. PromptHub will detect SKILL.md folders or a store index inside it.
skill.sourceTypeLocalHint: Best for a local folder path. PromptHub will scan it for skill folders.
skill.formatCuratedSubdir: Curated subdirectory inside a larger Git repository
skill.loadingOpenAiStore: Loading OpenAI Codex skills from the remote source...
skill.customStorePendingHint: This area will show skills fetched from the selected store in the next step. The current version focuses on source management and the left-side hierarchy.
skill.loadingRemoteStore: Loading Claude Code skills from the remote source...
skill.remoteStoreRateLimitHint: GitHub API rate limit reached. Try again in a few minutes, or switch to another network and retry.
skill.remoteStoreNetworkHint: Failed to reach GitHub. Check your network connection or switch to another network and retry.
skill.remoteStoreInvalidRepoHint: Repository not found or URL is invalid. Check the GitHub repository address and try again.
skill.invalidGitRepo: Please enter a GitHub repository URL, or use a local directory path instead
skill.storeSourceRequired: Please enter both a store name and URL
skill.noCustomStoresHint: Use the dashed Add Store entry in the left sidebar to connect your own skill sources.
skill.tryDifferentSearch: Try a different search or category
skill.sourceClaudeLocalFolder: Imported from Claude Code Local Skills Folder
skill.sourceCursorLocalFolder: Imported from Cursor Local Skills Folder
skill.symlinkHint: Creates a symlink in the platform directory — lighter updates going forward.
skill.copyHint: Copies SKILL.md to the platform directory — more compatible.
skill.symlinkDesc: Symlink: Creates a symbolic link pointing to the source file. All platforms share the same source — edits sync instantly, but requires filesystem support.
skill.copyModeDesc: Copy: Copies the SKILL.md file to each platform directory. Each copy is independent — edits in PromptHub won't sync automatically.
skill.translationOutdatedMessage: This skill's SKILL.md changed after the last translation. Retranslate now?
skill.aiNotConfigured: Please configure AI model in Settings first
skill.aiNotConfiguredDetailed: No usable AI translation model is configured. Please configure a chat model in Settings, or fix the selected translation model.
skill.translateGatewayTimeout: The AI service timed out while translating. Please try again in a moment, or switch to a faster / more stable model endpoint.
skill.translateNetworkError: The translation request could not reach the AI service. Please check your network and API endpoint, then try again.
skill.chooseAddMethod: Choose how you want to add a new skill:
skill.aiCreateDesc: Describe what you need, AI drafts the SKILL.md for review
skill.aiCreateHint: Uses the Skill Creator skill to draft a professional SKILL.md. You can review and edit before saving.
skill.aiDescPlaceholder: Describe what this skill should do, its purpose, and when to use it...

skill.scanLocalHint: Automatically detect SKILL.md files from PromptHub managed folders, Claude, Cursor, Windsurf, and other AI tools.
skill.scanLocalChoicesHint: Agent skill folders and arbitrary local skill folders are handled separately.
skill.importFromAgentSkillsDesc: Open the Agent Skill manager and import skills from Claude, Cline, Codex, or other agent folders.
skill.chooseLocalSkillFolderDesc: Select a folder such as /xxx/skills, then scan the skill folders inside it.
skill.scanLocalTimeout: Local skill scan timed out. Check whether an agent folder is inaccessible, then try again.
skill.refreshLibraryHint: Reload the PromptHub Skill library and platform distribution status.
skill.dropImportDesc: Drop a skill folder or a file named SKILL.md here to open the existing scan preview and import flow.
skill.dropImportUnsupported: Only local folders or a file named SKILL.md can be imported as skills.
skill.dropImportEmpty: No importable SKILL.md files were found in the dropped items.
skill.dropImportFailed: Failed to scan dropped skill files
skill.githubUrlHint: Use the repository root URL. PromptHub supports GitHub, Gitea, and other self-hosted Git repositories over HTTPS or SSH, then scans the repo for importable SKILL.md entries before you choose what to import.
skill.githubConstraintHint: Only repository root URLs are supported, such as https://github.com/owner/repo, https://gitea.example.com/owner/repo, or git@host:owner/repo.git
skill.githubFallbackHint: If no SKILL.md files are found, PromptHub will fall back to the root README.md as a single import option.

skill.githubNoImportableSkills: No importable SKILL.md or README.md files were found in this repository.
skill.githubScanHint: Select one or more skills from this repository before importing.

skill.createReturnedEmpty: Skill creation did not return a result
skill.noSkillsFound: No new local SKILL.md files found.
skill.nameHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only, e.g. my-skill-name

skill.polishNeedsContent: Please write some content first before polishing

skill.instructionsHint: Supports Markdown format for guiding AI on how to use this skill

skill.batchTagPartialFailure: Batch tag update finished: {{updated}} succeeded, {{failed}} failed
skill.batchStoreInstallResult: Batch install finished: {{succeeded}} succeeded, {{skipped}} skipped, {{failed}} failed
skill.batchStoreUpdateResult: Batch update finished: {{succeeded}} succeeded, {{skipped}} skipped, {{failed}} failed
skill.batchStoreRemoveResult: Batch remove finished: {{succeeded}} succeeded, {{skipped}} skipped, {{failed}} failed
skill.batchStoreRemoveMessage: Remove {{count}} selected imported Skills from My Skills? Remote store content will not be deleted.
skill.batchDeployDefaultsHint: Detected platforms are selected by default. Confirm the targets before starting batch sync.
skill.batchUndeployDefaultsHint: This only removes PromptHub-distributed skills from selected platforms. Your local repo remains untouched.
skill.snapshotPrompt: Enter a note for this snapshot
skill.noVersionHistoryHint: Editing SKILL.md or the file tree will automatically create snapshots that can be restored here.
skill.safetySummarySafe: No obvious malicious patterns were detected across {{count}} scanned files.
skill.safetySummaryWarn: {{warn}} warning findings were detected across {{count}} scanned files. Review the source before installing or executing it.
skill.safetySummaryHighRisk: {{high}} high-risk and {{warn}} warning findings were detected across {{count}} scanned files. Manual review is recommended before proceeding.
skill.safetySummaryBlocked: Obvious dangerous patterns were detected across {{count}} scanned files. Installation should remain blocked.
skill.safetyAssessmentDesc: AI-powered safety analysis of the skill content and source context.
skill.safetyAssessmentEmpty: No safety assessment available yet. Run a scan to check this skill.
skill.safetyScanBlockedInstall: Installation blocked due to safety concerns.
skill.safetyScanMethodAIDesc: AI scan reviews the SKILL.md and relevant repo files with model context, so it is the primary signal for installation decisions.
skill.safetyScoreDesc: Score 0–100 (higher = safer). Based on risk level and number of findings: blocked 0–10, high-risk 20–40, caution 50–70, safe 80–100.
skill.safetyDimContentDesc: AI review of SKILL.md instructions and suspicious repo files for dangerous commands, privilege escalation, secret access, prompt injection, and exfiltration behavior.
skill.safetyDimSourceDesc: Source provenance preflight plus AI context review for missing provenance, malformed URLs, custom hosts, and restricted internal addresses.
skill.safetyDimRepoDesc: Repository tree review for executable scripts, bundled binaries, persistence-related files, and other risky packaging signals surfaced to the AI scan.
skill.safetyScoreFormula: Score formula: level sets the base range (blocked 0–10 · high-risk 20–40 · caution 50–70 · safe 80–100), then each finding deducts points within that range.
skill.safetyScanBlockedSource: Safety scan blocked this source because it resolves to an internal or restricted address.
skill.safetyHighRiskConfirm: This skill has been flagged as high risk. Are you sure you want to proceed?
skill.confirmDeleteSingle: Are you sure you want to delete skill "{{name}}"?
skill.confirmDeleteMultiple: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected skills?
skill.deleteHint: Only removes from the PromptHub library. Source files are preserved. Platform copy installations are deleted from platform skill folders; symlink installations remove only the link.
skill.deleteSourceOnlyHint: Only removes this skill from the PromptHub library. Source files are preserved.
skill.deleteDistributedHint: This removes the skill from PromptHub. Source files are preserved. Distributed symlinks will be removed because they point back to PromptHub.
skill.deleteSymlinkInstallationsHint: Symlink distributions will be deleted directly.
skill.deleteCopyInstallationsHelp: Leave unchecked to keep copied Agent or project folders as detached copies.
skill.batchDeployFailed: Batch deploy completed with {{failed}} failures out of {{total}} targets.
skill.batchDeployFallback: {{count}} target(s) used copy install because symlinks were unavailable: {{preview}}
skill.batchUndeployHint: Removes corresponding skills from selected platform directories. Your local PromptHub repo is not affected.
skill.detailRenderError: This skill cannot be opened right now
skill.nameInvalid: Invalid name format (only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens)
skill.previewRenderError: Skill preview cannot be rendered right now
skill.previewRenderErrorHint: The skill content or metadata format has a compatibility issue, but it won't crash the entire detail page. You can retry later or switch to the file view to inspect the raw content.
skill.instructionsManagedInFiles: Instructions are managed in the file editor
skill.instructionsManagedInFilesHint: SKILL.md and other files should be edited in the file editor. This form is for metadata only (name, description, author, tags).
skill.userNotesPlaceholder: Add private notes about how you use this skill...

safetyFinding.encoded-shell-bootstrap: Detected encoded payload decoded and executed immediately
safetyFinding.system-persistence: Touches persistence or system service mechanisms
safetyFinding.env-mutation: Mutates shell environment or startup files
safetyFinding.untrusted-source-host: Source host is not a known trusted marketplace host
safetyFinding.external-audits: Marketplace exposes external security audit metadata
safetyFinding.internal-source: Source resolves to a local or internal address
safetyFinding.persistence-file: Repository contains workflow or persistence-related files

skill.updateConflict: Local changes conflict with the store update

platformWorkbench.heroTitle: From Prompt + Skill manager to an AI operations workspace
platformWorkbench.heroDesc: This prototype explores how PromptHub could grow into a unified platform for prompts, skills, agents, MCP integrations and execution history without forcing everything into the current two-mode shell.
platformWorkbench.sidebarFootDesc: Main navigation shifts from object count to domain structure: assets, automations, integrations and operations.
platformWorkbench.libraryTitle: Prompts, skills and reusable building blocks
platformWorkbench.libraryDesc: Content assets and reusable capabilities live in the same workspace, but remain clearly typed and searchable.
platformWorkbench.agentsDesc: Agents should sit beside skills, with explicit runtime, ownership and safety metadata instead of being hidden inside loose prompt conventions.
platformWorkbench.mcpTitle: External tools are managed as connections, not content
platformWorkbench.mcpDesc: MCP servers, model gateways and sync endpoints belong in a dedicated integration surface with health, auth and environment context.
platformWorkbench.operationsDesc: Once Prompt, Skill, Agent and MCP all coexist, users need a unified surface for runs, failures, audits and release readiness.
platformWorkbench.laneSkillsHint: Reusable capability packages and project skills
platformWorkbench.laneResourcesHint: Reference docs, context packs, imported files
platformWorkbench.laneMcpServersHint: Tool adapters, execution endpoints, repo bridges
platformWorkbench.laneProvidersHint: AI gateways, inference vendors, fallback chains
platformWorkbench.laneSyncHint: Backups, publishing targets and workspace mirrors
platformWorkbench.laneRunsHint: Recent tasks, jobs and automated sequences
platformWorkbench.laneAuditHint: Security checks, publish reviews and quality gates
platformWorkbench.laneReleasesHint: Version plans, rollout state and rollback safety
platformWorkbench.emptySearch: No prototype items match the current search.
platformWorkbench.whyLibrary: Prompts and skills can still feel familiar, but they no longer need to shoulder every future object type in the product.
platformWorkbench.whyAgents: Agents deserve their own lifecycle, observability and guardrails instead of being buried as prompt conventions or skill metadata hacks.
platformWorkbench.whyMcp: MCP and provider configuration is operational infrastructure. Treating it as a connection surface keeps auth, health and environment concerns explicit.
platformWorkbench.whyOperations: As the platform grows, users need a home for runs, audits and release status that cuts across every resource type.
platformWorkbench.noteDesc: This page is intentionally driven by mock structure. The goal is to preview a scalable navigation and workspace shape before migrating the real Prompt / Skill shell.

error.sha512Desc:
SHA512 checksum mismatch.
This is usually caused by CDN cache inconsistencies or network issues.
The file may have been downloaded successfully. You can try to install it manually.

toast.configAI: Please configure AI model in settings first
toast.selfHostedSyncConnectionSuccess: Connection successful. Remote workspace currently stores {{prompts}} prompts, {{folders}} folders, {{rules}} rules, and {{skills}} skills.
toast.selfHostedSyncPushSuccess: Uploaded {{prompts}} prompts, {{folders}} folders, {{rules}} rules, and {{skills}} skills to PromptHub Web.
toast.selfHostedSyncPullSuccess: Restored {{prompts}} prompts, {{folders}} folders, {{rules}} rules, and {{skills}} skills from PromptHub Web.

closeDialog.title: Close Application
closeDialog.message: Would you like to close the app or minimize to system tray?

quickAdd.title: Quick Add
quickAdd.desc: Paste content for AI analysis & categorization
quickAdd.generateEntryDesc: Describe your goal and let AI draft a Prompt
quickAdd.noAiConfigDesc: Please configure an AI provider in settings to use smart analysis.
quickAdd.tokenWarning: Using AI analysis will consume some tokens
quickAdd.modeAnalyzeDesc: Paste an existing Prompt and let AI extract title, tags, and folder
quickAdd.modeGenerateDesc: Describe your goal and let AI generate a ready-to-save Prompt draft
quickAdd.modeReverseImageDesc: Requires a vision-capable chat model; this does not call an image generation endpoint.
quickAdd.imageReversePlaceholder: For example: lean toward photorealistic photography and add quality terms for Midjourney / Stable Diffusion.
quickAdd.imageReverseDropTitle: Drop an image, paste a screenshot, or click to choose
quickAdd.imageReverseDropHint: PromptHub will save the image as a reference and ask a vision model to reverse the prompt.
quickAdd.imageReverseReady: Ready to reverse into an image prompt
quickAdd.generatePlaceholder: For example: Create a Prompt for writing Xiaohongshu headlines with a young, internet-savvy tone and output 10 title options.

imageReverse.title: Image Reverse
imageReverse.entryDesc: Generate a structured image prompt from a reference image
imageReverse.desc: Use a vision-capable chat model to reverse a reference image into a structured image prompt.
imageReverse.placeholder: For example: make it more photorealistic and add quality terms for Midjourney / Stable Diffusion.
imageReverse.dropTitle: Drop an image, paste a screenshot, or click to choose
imageReverse.dropHint: PromptHub will save the image as a reference and ask a vision model to reverse the prompt.
imageReverse.attachReferenceDesc: When enabled, the created image prompt keeps this image in its reference images.
imageReverse.ready: Ready to reverse into an image prompt
imageReverse.noVisionModelDesc: Configure a vision-capable chat model in Settings > AI Model Workbench, then select it in the Vision model route.
imageReverse.draftDesc: Review and edit the result first; create a prompt only when it looks right, or just copy without saving.

recovery.title: Data Recovery Available
recovery.description: We found one or more recovery sources. Review the counts, timestamps, and preview data below, then choose the source you want to restore.
recovery.success: Data recovered successfully! The app will restart.
recovery.overwriteWarning: Your current library has {{count}} prompt(s). Recovering will replace your existing data with the selected backup. Your current data will be backed up automatically before proceeding.
recovery.confirmDismiss: Are you sure you want to start with an empty database? Your old data will remain at the original location and can be recovered manually later.
recovery.sourcesDescription: Choose the source that looks like your real data.
recovery.previewEmpty: No preview items are available for this source yet.
recovery.previewUnavailable: Preview is not available for this source.
recovery.previewTruncated: Preview is truncated. Restore the source to inspect all items.

skillhub.hint: Browse and install public shared skills from the SkillHub community.
